summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of insig8 landing page. All major sections render correctly. Navigation, hero, signal card, built-from-research, problem vignettes, reframe, how it works, outcomes, stats, who-not-for, founder note, final CTA, and footer all present and functional.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid is 'hero-cta-btn' not 'hero-cta' — minor naming inconsistency but element exists
data-testid is 'nav-hamburger' (confirmed in testids list) but query_selector('[data-testid="mobile-menu-btn"]') failed — minor naming issue. Hamburger IS visible on mobile.

issues: Step 2 text is 'insig8 reads the patterns you can't' and Step 3 is 'You see what matters, when it matters' — spec said 'reads patterns' and 'see what matters' — content matches spec intent, just more verbose

critical_code_review_comments: All sections have comprehensive data-testid attributes — excellent testability coverage
Nav scroll blur working correctly (backdrop-filter: blur(12px) applied on scroll past 80px)
Signal card has all required data: Meridian Technologies Ltd, health score 47↓, 3 signals detected, Renewal in 47 days, View account, Draft outreach buttons
Hero two-weight headline working: light text for 'You Read Every Email. But Can You See' and bold teal for 'Every Pattern?'
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a pure frontend landing page at https://lucid-borg-5.preview.emergentagent.com. All sections render correctly. All data-testids are present and comprehensive. Nav blur on scroll works. Mobile hamburger is visible. Stats count-up animation works. Signal card data all present. All 6 outcome cards present. Founder note has video placeholder with play button visible. Footer has Product/Company/Legal columns and LinkedIn/Twitter icons. Copyright shows 2026.
passed_tests: Navigation logo (infinity mark + insig8 text) in teal
Nav links: Product, Pricing, Sign in, Start free
Hero dark background with signal node graph SVG
Signal card: Meridian Technologies Ltd, health score 47, 3 signals detected, Renewal in 47 days, View account, Draft outreach
Tool logos: Gmail, Google Calendar, Fathom, Fireflies, Outlook
Problem section: 'You've been here before' + all 3 vignette cards
Reframe section with pull quote and teal border-left
How It Works: light background, 3 steps with Connect/reads patterns/see what matters content
Stats: 3-6 weeks, 18 min, 40+ signals, 0 manual entry
Who It's Not For: 'An Honest Note' + 'insig8 is not for everyone'
Founder Note: video placeholder with play button visible
Final CTA: 'Your portfolio is already telling a story. Start reading it.'
Footer: logo, description, social icons, Product/Company/Legal columns, copyright 2026
Nav scroll blur: backdrop-filter blur(12px) applied after 80px scroll
Mobile hamburger menu visible on 390px viewport
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes
